subject: fix(embed): add allow-same-origin to iframe sandbox so charts can fetch data
body:
The repo-tor embed page fetches ./data.json from its own origin on load.
With only sandbox="allow-scripts", iframes get an opaque origin, causing
the fetch to fail silently. The page never receives chart data and stays
stuck on "Loading dashboard."

Adding allow-same-origin restores the iframe's real origin
(repo-tor.vercel.app) so the relative fetch succeeds. Navigation and
form submission remain blocked by the sandbox.

Tags: embed, charts, sandbox, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: embed-charts
Semver: patch
